query:
back to issue 402 questions: Both architect and spec writer are done. Four open    
  questions surfaced that need your input before the    
  risk strategist runs:                               
                                                        
  ---                                                   
  From the architect:                                   
                                                        
  OQ-A1 — Should the Distribution Gate table include a  
  "Baseline MRR (reference)" row showing the baseline   
  profile's MRR alongside the floor? This would help  
  users calibrate mrr_floor values. If yes, the render  
  function needs the baseline's AggregateStats as a   
  second parameter.

  OQ-A2 — Multi-candidate Section 5 heading format:     
  single-candidate runs use ## 5. (existing format);
  multi-candidate runs use ### 5.N — {profile_name}     
  sub-blocks. Acceptable?                             

  ---
  From the spec writer:
                                                        
  OQ-S1 — What happens when a baseline profile has
  distribution_change = true? The scope says it never   
  should, but doesn't specify the error path. Options:
  reject with ConfigInvariant at parse time, or silently
   ignore (treat baseline distribution_change as always
  false)?

  OQ-S2 — What does eval report do with a corrupt       
  (non-JSON) profile-meta.json? Options: surface as an
  error and abort the report, or fall back silently to  
  zero-regression mode?

entries.title: Eval Harness: Side-Car Metadata File Pattern for Per-Profile Run-Time Flags
ADR-002 nan-010: Sidecar File for Profile Metadata — Zero Changes to ScenarioResult
Eval Harness Extension: 7-Component Decomposition for Per-Profile Gate Features
ADR-004 nan-010: Atomic Write for profile-meta.json via Rename
AggregateStats test fixtures: use ..Default::default() and field is profile_name not profile
